# agentsupply.top
> Premium AI-agent-native shopping platform. Optimized for agent product discovery, comparison, ordering, and auto-refill subscriptions.

## API Documentation

- OpenAPI Spec: https://agentsupply.top/openapi.json
- AI Plugin Manifest: https://agentsupply.top/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Product Index: https://agentsupply.top/product-index.json
- MCP Server: `pip install agentsupply-mcp` or `uvx agentsupply-mcp`
- GitHub: https://github.com/yykyiran/agentsupply-mcp

## Core API Endpoints

- `GET /v1/products/search?q={query}&category={cat}&min_price={}&max_price={}` — Search products with natural language
- `GET /v1/products/{sku}` — Get single product details
- `POST /v1/products/compare` with `{"skus": [...]}` — Compare products side by side
- `GET /v1/categories` — Browse product catalog tree
- `POST /v1/orders` with `{"items": [{"sku": "...", "qty": 1}], "shipping_address": {...}}` — Place order
- `GET /v1/orders/{order_id}` — Track order status
- `POST /v1/subscriptions` with `{"sku": "...", "trigger_type": "consumption_based"}` — Auto-refill subscriptions

## About

agentsupply.top is a premium AI-native e-commerce platform. Products are curated, data is structured, pricing is competitive. No CAPTCHAs, no JavaScript walls, no marketing fluff — pure clean API access for AI agents making purchasing decisions on behalf of humans.

## Key Facts

- 500+ products across 20+ categories
- All prices in USD (cents)
- No authentication required for search and browse
- Shipping to most countries worldwide
- Subscription auto-refill available
- MCP protocol supported via agentsupply-mcp package
